content: The maximum percentage error in the equivalent resistance of two parallel connected resistors of $100 \Omega$ and $900 \Omega$ with each having a maximum $5 \%$ error is ____________\%. (Round off to nearest integer value)
explanation:
$$ \begin{aligned}Given\,\, resistors :\, R_1 & =100 \pm 5 \%=(100 \pm 5) \Omega \\ R_2 & =900 \pm 5 \%=(900 \pm 45) \Omega \\ R_{\text {eq }} & =R_1\left\|R_2=100\right\| 900=90 \Omega \end{aligned} $$

For parallel combination,

$$ \begin{aligned} \frac{\delta R_{\text {eq }}}{R_{\text {eq }}} & = \pm\left[\frac{R_{\text {eq }}}{R_1} \times \frac{\delta R_1}{R_1} \times \frac{R_{\text {eq }}}{R_2} \times \frac{\delta R_2}{R_2}\right] \\ & = \pm\left[\frac{90}{100} \times 5 \%+\frac{90}{900} \times 5 \%\right] \\ & = \pm 5 \% \end{aligned} $$
